abusive-content.label: Abusive Content
abusive-content.description: Content that is illegal or actionable under applicable legislation.

malicious-code.label: Malicious Code
malicious-code.description: Software intentionally designed to cause damage or gain unauthorised access.

information-gathering.label: Information Gathering
information-gathering.description: Activities aimed at collecting information about targets for later exploitation.

intrusion-attempts.label: Intrusion Attempts
intrusion-attempts.description: Attempts to exploit vulnerabilities or bypass security controls to gain access.

intrusions.label: Intrusions
intrusions.description: Successful unauthorised access to systems, accounts, or applications.

availability.label: Availability
availability.description: Incidents affecting the availability of systems, networks, or services.

information-content-security.label: Information Content Security
information-content-security.description: Incidents affecting the confidentiality, integrity, or availability of data.

fraud.label: Fraud
fraud.description: Actions intended to deceive or misuse resources for personal gain.

vulnerable.label: Vulnerable
vulnerable.description: Systems or services with exploitable weaknesses or misconfigurations.

spam.label: Spam
spam.description: Unsolicited bulk messages sent for commercial or malicious purposes.

harmful-speech.label: Harmful Speech
harmful-speech.description: Hate speech, discrimination, or threats directed at individuals or groups.

child-abuse-material.label: Child Abuse Material
child-abuse-material.description: Content depicting the sexual exploitation or abuse of children.

virus.label: Virus
virus.description: Self-replicating malware that attaches to legitimate programs or files.

worm.label: Worm
worm.description: Self-propagating malware that spreads across networks without user interaction.

trojan.label: Trojan
trojan.description: Malware disguised as legitimate software to trick users into execution.

spyware.label: Spyware
spyware.description: Software that covertly collects user information without consent.

ransomware.label: Ransomware
ransomware.description: Malware that encrypts data and demands payment for its release.

rootkit.label: Rootkit
rootkit.description: Software designed to hide the existence of malicious processes or programs.

dialer.label: Dialer
dialer.description: Malware that connects a system to premium-rate telephone numbers.

cryptominer.label: Cryptominer
cryptominer.description: Malware that uses system resources to mine cryptocurrency without authorisation.

scanning.label: Scanning
scanning.description: Active probing of networks or systems to discover services and vulnerabilities.

sniffing.label: Sniffing
sniffing.description: Passive interception of network traffic to capture sensitive data.

social-engineering.label: Social Engineering
social-engineering.description: Manipulation of individuals to divulge confidential information or perform actions.

phishing.label: Phishing
phishing.description: Fraudulent attempts to obtain credentials by impersonating a trustworthy entity.

exploitation-of-vulnerability.label: Exploitation of Vulnerability
exploitation-of-vulnerability.description: Attempt to exploit a known software or hardware vulnerability.

login-attempts.label: Login Attempts
login-attempts.description: Brute-force or credential-stuffing attacks against authentication mechanisms.

new-attack-signature.label: New Attack Signature
new-attack-signature.description: Previously unknown attack pattern not matching existing signatures.

compromised-account.label: Compromised Account
compromised-account.description: Unauthorised access gained to a user or service account.

compromised-application.label: Compromised Application
compromised-application.description: Application integrity breached through exploitation or tampering.

compromised-system.label: Compromised System
compromised-system.description: Full or partial unauthorised control obtained over a system.

bot.label: Bot
bot.description: System compromised and enrolled in a botnet for remote command execution.

dos.label: Denial of Service
dos.description: Attack rendering a service unavailable by overwhelming it with requests.

ddos.label: Distributed Denial of Service
ddos.description: Coordinated denial-of-service attack originating from multiple sources.

sabotage.label: Sabotage
sabotage.description: Deliberate destruction or disruption of infrastructure or services.

outage.label: Outage
outage.description: Unintentional service disruption caused by misconfiguration or failure.

unauthorised-information-access.label: Unauthorised Information Access
unauthorised-information-access.description: Access to information without proper authorisation or clearance.

unauthorised-information-modification.label: Unauthorised Information Modification
unauthorised-information-modification.description: Alteration of data without proper authorisation or approval.

data-loss.label: Data Loss
data-loss.description: Permanent loss of data due to accidental deletion or system failure.

data-leak.label: Data Leak
data-leak.description: Exposure of sensitive information to unauthorised parties.

unauthorised-use-of-resources.label: Unauthorised Use of Resources
unauthorised-use-of-resources.description: Use of institutional resources for unauthorised purposes.

copyright.label: Copyright
copyright.description: Distribution or use of copyrighted material without authorisation.

masquerade.label: Masquerade
masquerade.description: Impersonation of another entity to gain an illegitimate advantage.

weak-crypto.label: Weak Cryptography
weak-crypto.description: Use of outdated or insufficient cryptographic algorithms or key lengths.

ddos-amplifier.label: DDoS Amplifier
ddos-amplifier.description: Misconfigured service that can be abused to amplify denial-of-service attacks.

potentially-unwanted-accessible.label: Potentially Unwanted Accessible
potentially-unwanted-accessible.description: Service accessible from the internet that should not be publicly exposed.

information-disclosure.label: Information Disclosure
information-disclosure.description: System inadvertently exposing sensitive information to unauthenticated users.

vulnerable-system.label: Vulnerable System
vulnerable-system.description: System running software with known unpatched vulnerabilities.
